title: anthoxanthum horsfieldii var. japonicum
intro: Anthoxanthum horsfieldii var. japonicum, commonly known as Japanese oat grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Japanese oat grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Japanese oat grass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
